/usr/bin/c++ -Wall  -Wsuggest-override -Werror=vla -pthread -Wshadow -O3 -DNDEBUG -s -rdynamic CMakeFiles/eeschema.dir/__/common/single_top.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eeschema.dir/__/common/pgm_base.cpp.o -o eeschema  ../common/libcommon.a ../common/libgal.a ../common/liblegacy_gal.a ../common/libcommon.a ../common/libgal.a ../common/liblegacy_gal.a ../common/libcommon.a ../common/libgal.a ../common/liblegacy_gal.a ../common/libcommon.a ../common/libgal.a ../common/liblegacy_gal.a -pthread -lwx_gtk2u_gl-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_aui-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_adv-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_html-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_core-3.0 -lwx_baseu_net-3.0 -lwx_baseu-3.0 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_stc-3.0 -lGLEW -lcairo -lpixman-1 -lGL -lGLU -lcurl -lssl -lcrypto -lwx_gtk2u_gl-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_aui-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_adv-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_html-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_core-3.0 -lwx_baseu_net-3.0 -lwx_baseu-3.0 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_stc-3.0 ../bitmaps_png/libbitmaps.a ../polygon/libpolygon.a
